version_description: Complete version of the song in Bbm.
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Waiting For Tonight - Jennifer Lopez

[Intro]
| [ch]Bbm[/ch] | [ch]Ab6[/ch] | [ch]Fm7[/ch] |

[tab][ch]Gb[/ch]        [ch]Bbm[/ch] [ch]Ab6[/ch] [ch]Fm7[/ch] [ch]Gb[/ch] [ch]Bbm[/ch] [ch]Ab6[/ch] [ch]Fm7[/ch] [ch]Gb[/ch]  [ch]Bbm[/ch] [ch]Ab6[/ch] [ch]Fm7[/ch] [ch]Gb[/ch] [ch]Bbm[/ch]
Oooooooh yeah[/tab]

[Verse 1]
[tab]                  [ch]Ab6[/ch]                    [ch]Fm7[/ch]                    [ch]Gb[/ch]     [ch]Bbm[/ch]
Like a movie scene, In the sweetest dream, I have pictured us together[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]Ab6[/ch]              [ch]Fm7[/ch]                  [ch]Gb[/ch]
Now to feel your lips On my fingertips What to say is even better[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Bbm[/ch]                     [ch]Ab6[/ch]              [ch]Fm7[/ch]
That I ever thought it could possibly be It's perfect, it's passion,[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Gb[/ch]
it's setting me free[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Bbm[/ch]                    [ch]Ab6[/ch]                 [ch]Fm7[/ch]                    [ch]Gb[/ch]
From all of my sadness, the tears that I cried, I have spent all of my life[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]            [ch]Bbm[/ch]       [ch]Ab6[/ch]      [ch]Fm7[/ch]                     [ch]Gb[/ch]
Waiting for tonight, ohh, when you would be here in my arms[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Bbm[/ch]       [ch]Ab6[/ch]       [ch]Fm7[/ch]                         [ch]Gb[/ch]
Waiting for tonight, aohh, I've dreamed of this love for so long[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Bbm[/ch]      [ch]Ab6[/ch]   [ch]Fm7[/ch] [ch]Gb[/ch] [ch]Bbm[/ch]
Waiting for tonight Ohh, ohh[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab]                    [ch]Ab6[/ch]                  [ch]Fm7[/ch]                        [ch]Gb[/ch]    [ch]Bbm[/ch]
Tender words you say, Take my breath away, Love me now and leave me never[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Ab6[/ch]                   [ch]Fm7[/ch]                       [ch]Gb[/ch]
Found a sacred place, Lost in your embrace, I wanna stay in this forever[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Bbm[/ch]                        [ch]Ab6[/ch]                 [ch]Fm7[/ch]                 [ch]Gb[/ch]
I think of the days when the sun used to set, On my empty heart all alone in my bed[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bbm[/ch]                   [ch]Ab6[/ch]                  [ch]Fm7[/ch]                  [ch]Gb[/ch]
Tossing and turning, emotions were strong, I knew I had to hold on[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]            [ch]Bbm[/ch]       [ch]Ab6[/ch]      [ch]Fm7[/ch]                     [ch]Gb[/ch]
Waiting for tonight, ohh, when you would be here in my arms[/tab]

[tab]            [ch]Bbm[/ch]      [ch]Ab6[/ch]   [ch]Fm7[/ch] [ch]Gb[/ch]
Waiting for tonight, Ohh, ohh Ohh,[/tab]

[tab]                           [ch]Ab6[/ch]                 [ch]Fm7[/ch]                 [ch]Gb[/ch]
Gone are the days when the sun used to set, On my empty heart all alone in my bed[/tab]
